🤖 AI Free Plan
Home Guides Tools 中文

All Free AI Tools

Sorted by rating, 91 AI tools listed

Midjourney

⭐ 5
Image Generation

The most popular AI image generator, consistently setting quality and aesthetics standards. Limited free trial credits, but output quality is worth paying for. V7 is stunning.

🆓 0 ()
Paid from: $10/month
View Details

Seedance 2.0

⭐ 5
Video Generation

ByteDance's AI video generation tool. The 2.0 full version went viral on Bilibili. 1080p resolution, unlimited free use, no watermark, no queue, supports face upload. One of the best free AI video generators available.

🆓 0 ()
Paid from: N/A
View Details

Stable Diffusion

⭐ 5
Image Generation

Open-source AI image generation model. Local deployment is completely free with unlimited use. The Qiuye integration pack makes installation easy for beginners. Supports various LoRA models and plugins. Quality and freedom surpass all online paid tools.

🆓 0 ()
Paid from: Free (requires GPU)
View Details

Coze

⭐ 5
Agent Platform

ByteDance's agent development platform. Create AI agents with no code, publish to WeChat/Feishu/web. Completely free for personal use, unlimited agent creation, ~1000 calls/day.

🆓 0 ()
Paid from: Free
View Details

Groq

⭐ 5
Large Language Model

Groq uses custom LPU chips for inference, delivering speeds several times faster than standard GPUs. Free tier offers 1000 requests/day with Llama, Qwen, and other open-source models. If you need real-time response speed for chat or streaming, Groq is currently the fastest free inference service available.

🆓 1000 requests/day (Daily)
Paid from: Pay-as-you-go
View Details

NVIDIA NIM

⭐ 5
Large Language Model

NVIDIA's cloud inference platform, free for developers. Supports 121 models including DeepSeek V4, Llama, Qwen, and more. The largest model selection among free platforms, ideal for developers who need to compare multiple models.

🆓 developer program free (Daily)
Paid from: Pay-as-you-go
View Details

MiniMax Hailuo

⭐ 4.5
Video Generation

By MiniMax, natural motion effects that don't look AI-generated. 300 free credits on signup, generous for its category.

🆓 66 credits/day (Daily)
Paid from: $9.99/month
View Details

Xiaomi MiMo Code

⭐ 4.5
AI LLM

Xiaomi's AI coding agent forked from OpenCode, open-sourced under MIT. The killer feature is the built-in MiMo Auto channel — zero config, free for 1 month, runs MiMo-V2.5 with 1M token context. Coding performance is on par with Claude Sonnet 4.6 on SWE-Bench, but 40-60% more token-efficient. Highlights: cross-session memory, voice input, auto knowledge distillation. After the free period, you need a Token Plan subscription.

🆓 1 month (MiMo-V2.5, 1M context). Platform signup bonus valid 40 days, invite friends for $2 each (One-time)
Paid from: Token Plan Lite and up
View Details

DeepSeek

⭐ 4.5
AI LLM

DeepSeek's flagship model, the cost-performance king of Chinese AI. V4 is free to use, API pricing is 1/10th of GPT-4o. Excellent at coding and math, competitive with closed-source models in benchmarks.

🆓 0 (One-time)
Paid from: API $0.14/million tokens
View Details

AtomCode

⭐ 4.5
Coding Assistant

Huawei-backed open-source terminal AI coding assistant, competing with Claude Code. CodingPlan offers free 30-day access to GLM-5.1, DeepSeek-V4-Flash, Qwen3 series and more, running on Ascend chips with 5-hour rolling window metering.

🆓 30 days (One-time)
Paid from: CodingPlan free, API separate
View Details

Cursor

⭐ 4.5
Coding Assistant

AI coding IDE, #1 market share at 31%. Free Hobby plan with no credit card required. Pro at $20/mo supports GPT-4o, Claude and more.

🆓 0 (One-time)
Paid from: $20/month
View Details

NotebookLM

⭐ 4.5
AI LLM

Google's AI research tool, completely free. Up to 50 sources per notebook, auto-generates podcasts, video overviews, reports. Most underrated free AI tool of 2026.

🆓 0 ()
Paid from: Completely free
View Details

Cline

⭐ 4.5
Coding Assistant

Open-source AI coding assistant for VS Code, JetBrains, and CLI. Supports 200+ models including Claude, GPT, Gemini. Launched ClinePass in June 2026 with curated models like GLM 5.1 - no API key needed. Free to use with your own API key. 63K+ GitHub stars.

🆓 0 ()
Paid from: Free (BYOK)
View Details

GitHub Copilot

⭐ 4.5
Coding Assistant

Microsoft's AI coding assistant, deeply integrated with VS Code and GitHub. Code completion, Chat, and Agent mode. Free for students and OSS maintainers, $10/month for individuals.

🆓 2000 completions/month (free tier) (Monthly)
Paid from: $10/month
View Details

ChatGPT

⭐ 4.5
AI Large Models

OpenAI's flagship product, the most widely used AI chatbot globally. Free tier uses GPT-4o mini, Plus users access GPT-4o and o3 reasoning models. Covers chat, image generation, coding, and data analysis.

🆓 4 and GPT Image 2 available via free channels (Daily)
Paid from: $20/month
View Details

Claude

⭐ 4.5
AI Large Models

By Anthropic, known for safety and long-context processing. Free tier has daily message limits. Pro users access Claude Code for terminal-based coding. Top coding performance across multiple benchmarks.

🆓 4.8 available free domestically via specific channels (Daily)
Paid from: $20/month
View Details

Kling AI

⭐ 4
Video Generation

Kuaishou's flagship video generation model. Produces some of the most realistic AI videos. Kling 3.0 full version is now available with unlimited free 1080p watermark-free generation via specific channels.

🆓 66 credits/day; Kling 3.0 full version available unlimited free via third-party channels (Daily)
Paid from: $8/month
View Details

Tongyi Qianwen

⭐ 4
AI LLM

Alibaba's model family, from lightweight 0.5B to flagship 235B. Qwen3 series is the all-rounder among open-source models. Free to use, cheap API. Supports multimodal (text, image, video, code).

🆓 2.5 Max generates watermark-free images and videos for free (One-time)
Paid from: API $0.12/million tokens
View Details

Kimi

⭐ 4
AI LLM

By Moonshot AI, Kimi K2.6 focuses on coding and agent capabilities. 13-hour non-stop coding, 300 sub-agents in parallel, SWE-Bench Pro score of 58.6. Free tier includes daily credits for chat and light coding tasks.

🆓 0 (Daily)
Paid from: API $0.12/million tokens
View Details

Codeium

⭐ 4
Coding Assistant

Established AI coding assistant supporting 70+ languages with broad IDE plugin coverage. Personal tier is completely free with no usage limits. Enterprise tier adds more features.

🆓 0 ()
Paid from: Free (Personal)
View Details

Tongyi Lingma

⭐ 4
Coding Assistant

Alibaba's AI coding assistant, deeply integrated with VS Code and JetBrains. Uses Qwen models, excellent Chinese coding experience. Free for individuals, enterprise by seat.

🆓 0 ()
Paid from: Free (Personal)
View Details

Tencent Marvis

⭐ 4
AI Assistant

Operating system-level AI assistant by Tencent's App Store team. Fully launched May 21. 10M free tokens daily, powered by DeepSeek V4 and Hunyuan models. Windows, Mac, Android. Privacy mode (local model, zero upload) and efficiency mode (cloud-edge). 8 built-in agents for file search, system settings, remote control, document processing.

🆓 1000 (Daily)
Paid from: Completely free
View Details

Windsurf

⭐ 4
Coding Assistant

AI coding IDE, formerly Codeium. Free plan at $0/month with Light usage. Cascade feature for multi-file editing. Pro at $20/mo.

🆓 0 (One-time)
Paid from: $20/month
View Details

Perplexity

⭐ 4
AI LLM

AI search engine: search + read + summarize in one step. Free tier with limited daily Pro searches, unlimited basic search. Pro $20/mo. Best source transparency.

🆓 0 (Daily)
Paid from: $20/month
View Details

Ideogram

⭐ 4
Image Generation

AI image generation tool with best text rendering. By ex-Google Brain team, Ideogram 3.0 released Feb 2026. Free tier ~25 images/day, no watermark.

🆓 25 images/day (Daily)
Paid from: ~$7/month
View Details

Freebuff

⭐ 4
Coding Assistant

Free AI coding agent that edits code via natural language in terminal. Based on paid Codebuff, ad-supported. Uses DeepSeek V4 Flash by default, supports Kimi K2.6, MiniMax M2.7 and other models.

🆓 0 ()
Paid from: Codebuff from $100/mo
View Details

Google Gemini

⭐ 4
AI LLM

Google's AI assistant with Search integration. Free tier introduced weekly percentage caps in May 2026. Paid from $19.99/month.

🆓 0 (One-time)
Paid from: $19.99/month
View Details

Tongyi Wanxiang

⭐ 4
Image Generation

Alibaba's AI image generation tool. 500 free images/month, diverse styles, strong Chinese prompt understanding.

🆓 500 images/day (500/month) (Daily)
Paid from: Free (500 images/month)
View Details

Jimeng AI

⭐ 4
Image Generation

ByteDance's AI creation platform. International version offers larger free quotas with unlimited free image generation. Supports image gen 4.5, video 3.5pro/3.0pro.

🆓 66 credits/day; International version has larger free quota, unlimited free image generation (Daily)
Paid from: Free (66 credits/day)
View Details

LiblibAI

⭐ 4
Image Generation

China's largest online Stable Diffusion platform with massive model library. Free daily compute.

🆓 0 (Daily)
Paid from: Free (limited daily compute)

⭐ 4
Image Generation

Popular overseas AI painting platform, 150 free tokens daily (~15 images). Multiple models, Alchemy HD, ControlNet.

🆓 150 tokens/day (~15 images) (Daily)

Playground AI

⭐ 4
Image Generation

Free AI painting tool, 500 free images daily. Supports SDXL and PXL models, filters and editing.

🆓 500 images/day (Daily)

Adobe Firefly

⭐ 4
Image Generation

Adobe's AI painting tool, safest for commercial use. 25 free credits/month, commercially safe images.

🆓 25 credits/month (Daily)
Paid from: Free (25 credits/month)

Poe

⭐ 4
AI Assistant

AI aggregation platform by Quora, one interface for all major models. Free users get daily credits to use GPT-4o, Claude Sonnet, Gemini, Llama. $20/month for more usage and premium models.

🆓 0 (Daily)
Paid from: $20/month
View Details

Astron Coding Plan

⭐ 4
Coding

Astron Coding Plan by iFlytek is a monthly AI coding subscription service for developers, integrating Spark X2, GLM, Kimi, MiniMax, DeepSeek, Qwen and other popular open-source models. First purchase only ¥3.9/month with unlimited requests.

🆓 3.9 (Monthly)
Paid from: First purchase ¥3.9/month, renewal ¥19/month
View Details

Suno

⭐ 4
AI Music

The world's most popular AI music generator. Type a prompt and get a complete song with lyrics, melody, and vocals. Free plan: 50 credits daily (10 songs).

🆓 50 credits daily, 10 songs (Daily)
Paid from: $8/month (Pro)
View Details

V0.dev

⭐ 4
Coding

Vercel's AI UI generator. Describe or screenshot a UI and get React component code. Free plan: $5 monthly credits + 7 messages/day.

🆓 5 monthly credits, 7 messages/day (Monthly)
Paid from: $30/month (Team)
View Details

Gamma

⭐ 4
AI Assistant

AI-powered presentation generator. Enter a topic and get auto-designed slides with layout, images, and content. Free plan: ~400 credits, no card required.

🆓 400 credits (initial grant) (One-time)
Paid from: $10/month (Plus)
View Details

Manus AI

⭐ 4
AI Assistant

Leading autonomous AI agent that independently browses the web, writes code, conducts research, and builds applications

🆓 300 daily refresh credits (all plans) (Daily)
Paid from: $20/month (Standard)

Grok

⭐ 4
Large Language Model

xAI's (Elon Musk) large language model. Grok 4.2/4.3 went viral on Bilibili. Free to use with no restrictions on mobile and PC. After removing limits, the experience rivals paid alternatives.

Paid from: $8/month

⭐ 4
Image Generation

OpenAI's latest image generation model. Unlimited free use via free channels. Supports text-to-image, image editing, style transfer. Quality rivals Midjourney.

Google Jules

⭐ 4
AI Coding

Google's free AI coding tool. Version 1.5 major upgrade: 60x limit increase, 10x speed boost. Completely free, supports code generation, debugging, refactoring. A free alternative to GitHub Copilot.

Paid from: N/A

NanoPro / NanoBanana 2

⭐ 4
Image Generation

Next-gen AI image generation model. Supports 4K direct output, no watermark, unlimited free use. Available directly via Lovart platform with no queue.

Paid from: N/A

Lovart

⭐ 4
AI Design

AI design platform integrating NanoPro, NanoBanana 2 and other image generation models. No watermark, unlimited free use, 4K direct output. One of the most comprehensive free AI design platforms.

Paid from: N/A
View Details

Tabbit

⭐ 4
AI Assistant

An AI browser built from the ground up by Meituan's Light Years team — not a Chrome extension with a sidebar, but AI woven into every layer. Chat with AI while browsing, referencing pages, screenshots, or local files. Built-in Agent automates repetitive tasks like form filling and data collection. Create custom Skills for your workflows. Standard version is free forever with ~1000 AI chats/week, 50 images, and 10 Agent tasks.

🆓 1000 chats/week + 50 images + 10 Agent tasks (Daily)
Paid from: N/A
View Details

iFlytek Spark MaaS

⭐ 4
AI Large Models

iFlytek's one-stop LLM platform aggregating Spark, DeepSeek, Qwen models. Currently offering free unlimited access to Qwen3.6-35B-A3B and Qwen3.5-35B-A3B until end of June. Supports API calls via CC Switch for Claude Code, Codex integration.

🆓 6 (One-time)
Paid from: Token Plan subscription
View Details

Zhipu GLM Coding Plan

⭐ 4
Coding Assistant

Zhipu's AI coding subscription paired with ZCode IDE. Free models available (GLM-4.7-Flash, GLM-4.5-Flash). Paid tiers: Lite ~$10/mo, Pro ~$30/mo, Max ~$80/mo (quarterly billing). Compatible with 20+ coding tools. Subscribers get 1.5x quota in ZCode.

🆓 4.7 ()
Paid from: Lite $30/quarter (~$10/mo)
View Details

SenseNova

⭐ 4
AI Large Models

SenseTime's LLM platform. Token Plan beta is completely free: 1500 calls per 5 hours. Supports native multimodal Flash-Lite (no vision-to-text conversion), U1-Fast, and DeepSeek-V4-Flash. OpenAI SDK compatible, no credit card needed.

🆓 5 calls per 5 hours (free beta) (Monthly)
Paid from: None yet (free beta, Lite/Pro coming soon)
View Details

ModelScope

⭐ 4
AI Large Models

Alibaba Cloud's largest open-source AI model community in China with 50K+ models. 2000 free API calls daily, OpenAI SDK compatible. Supports Qwen, DeepSeek, GLM, Baichuan and more. Requires Alibaba Cloud account binding.

🆓 2000 free API calls per day (Monthly)
Paid from: Free (pay-per-use after quota)
View Details

Agnes AI

⭐ 4
AI Large Models

Sapiens AI's (Singapore) full-modality AI platform. Free Access tier: use frontier models for free. Text (Agnes 2.0 Flash, Claw-Eval #9 globally), Image (Agnes Image 2.0 Flash), Video (Agnes Video V2.0). Basic TPS limit, fair-use quota. Paid Token Plan for higher TPS and quotas.

🆓 0 ()
Paid from: Token Plan (monthly/yearly, higher TPS and quotas)
View Details

Cline.bot API

⭐ 4
AI Large Models

Cline's official API platform. 3 free models (MiniMax-M3, Xiaomi MiMo-v2.5, DeepSeek-V4-Flash) all with 1M context. OpenAI compatible. $0.5 signup bonus, free models don't consume credits. Google/GitHub login, no credit card.

🆓 3 models free forever, no credit consumption, 1M context ()
Paid from: $0.5 on signup (for paid models)
View Details

Alibaba Bailian

⭐ 4
AI Large Models

Alibaba Cloud's LLM platform (DashScope) with 130+ models via unified API. New users get 1M free tokens per model, covering Qwen series, vision models, Tongyi Wanxiang image generation. All models share one API key, OpenAI compatible.

🆓 100 (One-time)
Paid from: Pay-per-use after free credits consumed
View Details

Huawei DevEco Code

⭐ 4
Coding Assistant

Huawei CLI coding assistant with built-in Zhipu GLM-5.1 model, ready to use after login with no manual selection needed. Completely free with no usage limits, trained on Huawei Ascend chips, coding capability reaches 94.6% of Claude Opus 4.6. Rich theme options with dark/light mode switching, great looking interface.

Paid from: Free

AI Chat

Tencent's AI assistant powered by Hunyuan HY2.0. Deeply integrated with WeChat ecosystem. Supports AI search, document analysis, image understanding and custom agent creation. 128M MAU.

AI Chat

Alibaba's intelligent search + AI assistant, integrated with Qwen 3.7. Multimodal search 38% faster, smart summary accuracy 97.8%. All-in-one search and creation tool.

Video Generation

ByteDance's video editor with AI features including smart subtitles, text-to-video, AI effects, and one-tap editing. Basic editing and common AI features are free.

Paid from: ~$4/month

Feishu Minutes

⭐ 4
Productivity

AI meeting transcription tool in Feishu ecosystem. Auto audio/video transcription, multi-language, smart summary, keyword extraction. 300 free minutes/month for Feishu users.

🆓 300 minutes free transcription per month (Monthly)
Paid from: ~$42/person/year

WPS AI

⭐ 4
Productivity

AI assistant built into WPS Office. Smart writing, one-tap PPT generation, spreadsheet analysis, PDF reading. 7-day free trial, basic features free, from 198 CNY/year.

🆓 7 (One-time)
Paid from: ~$28/year
View Details

Dify

⭐ 4
Agent Platform

Open-source AI app development platform. Visual workflow orchestration, RAG engine, 100+ model integration. Community edition free and self-hostable, cloud free tier: 200 API calls/month.

🆓 200 API calls/month (One-time)
Paid from: $59/month
View Details

ZenMux

⭐ 4
AI Large Models

Enterprise LLM aggregation platform with unified API for 200+ models (GPT-4o, Claude, Gemini, Qwen, etc.). Intelligent routing automatically selects the best model, with unique AI Model Insurance to eliminate hallucination risk. Compatible with OpenAI/Anthropic/Google protocols.

🆓 5 USD credits on signup (One-time)
Paid from: $0.001/1K tokens
View Details

bb-browser

⭐ 4
Coding Assistant

Open-source tool: "Your browser is the API." CLI + MCP server for AI agents to control Chrome with your login state. No separate API keys needed — reuses your existing browser sessions. Perfect for developers who need AI to automate web tasks.

🆓 0 completely free (open source) ()
Paid from: Completely free
View Details

OpenRouter

⭐ 4
Large Language Model

API aggregation platform — one endpoint to access them all. 27 free models, accessible from China without VPN. Switch between backends by just changing the model name. Free tier: 50 requests/day, unlock 1000/day with $10 top-up.

🆓 50 requests/day (1000 after $10 top-up) (Daily)
Paid from: $10 top-up
View Details

Cloudflare Workers AI

⭐ 4
Large Language Model

Cloudflare's edge AI inference service with 10,000 free Neurons/day. Global CDN edge nodes deliver ultra-low latency. Supports LLM, embeddings, image, and audio models. Accessible from China.

🆓 10000 Neurons/day (Daily)
Paid from: $0.011/1000 Neurons
View Details

SiliconFlow

⭐ 4
Large Language Model

Chinese API aggregation platform unifying open-source models under one interface. Free tier: RPM 500, TPM 2M, supporting DeepSeek, Qwen, GLM and more. Saves the trouble of self-hosting open-source models, with fast domestic access.

🆓 RPM 500, TPM 2,000,000 ()
Paid from: From ¥0.006/1K tokens
View Details

GitHub Models

⭐ 4
Large Language Model

GitHub's free AI model inference service, accessible with just a GitHub account. Supports GPT-4.1, GPT-4o and other OpenAI models for free — the lowest barrier to entry for GPT-series models.

🆓 150 requests/day (Daily)
View Details

HuggingFace Serverless Inference

⭐ 4
Large Language Model

The 'supermarket' of open-source models. Free serverless inference supports a massive selection of models (LLaMA, Mistral, Falcon, etc.). Unparalleled model variety for research and cross-architecture comparison. Free credits allocated monthly by account tier.

🆓 monthly variable credits by account tier (Monthly)
Paid from: Pro $9/month
View Details

Mistral La Plateforme

⭐ 4
Large Language Model

Official API platform from Europe's strongest open-source model provider. Free tier supports 1 req/s, 500K tokens/min. Mistral models excel in multilingual and code generation tasks.

Video Generation

Video Generation

Pioneer in AI video generation. Gen-3 Alpha model delivers excellent quality. 125 free credits monthly, enough for a few high-quality short clips. Popular among professional creators.

AI Large Models

AI Large Models

Large Language Model

InternLM

⭐ 3
Large Language Model

InternLM API from Shanghai AI Lab. Free tier: 10 RPM, API key valid for 6 months. InternVL3-78B is a multimodal model with strong image-text understanding. Domestic access, solid academic background.
